review_text: App crashes every time I try to open a task. Completely unusable since the 3.0.1 update.
Cannot login since the latest update. Blank white screen after entering password.
Data sync is completely broken. I lost two weeks of task data.
The app freezes whenever I try to attach a file to a task.
Notifications stopped working after update. Missing all my deadlines.
Please add a dark mode option. My eyes hurt using the app at night.
Would love to see a calendar view for tasks. Monthly calendar would be amazing.
Missing functionality for recurring tasks. Please add daily and weekly repeat options.
Please add the ability to share tasks with team members.
Would be great to have an Apple Watch app for checking tasks.
Amazing app! It has completely transformed how I manage my day.
Love the new subtasks feature. Works perfectly and exactly what I needed.
Works perfectly on my Pixel 8. Fast clean interface and reliable sync.
Best update yet! The new dashboard is beautiful and so much faster.
Too expensive for what it offers. Other apps give same features for free.
Poor customer service. Reported a bug two weeks ago and still no response.
App is extremely slow on my older phone. Takes 10 seconds just to open.
